review_text: Alles prima, gut organisiert und alles sauber.
Super schöner, sauberer Campingplatz! Sehr netter Empfang an der Rezeption.

Our second stay here and first time staying with our ev car and have been told we are not allowed to charge our ev car? We’ve paid for a powered site with ensuite and are camping in a tent - what's the difference charging an ev car to a caravan? Caravan draws more power than an ev, so doesn't make sense to us. Unfortunately we won't be back which is a shame as it was going to become a regular trip due to family living in the area. 👍
Overpriced for a 1 night stay of $50 - wont entice me back.

Very nice caravan park.
We had a private bathroom.
Really enjoyed the stay here. Great park with friendly staff. Grounds well kept it looks a treat. Close to everything got to hand feed the local dolphins.
Friendly and informative staff, the caravan park was clean and well maintained. Amenities were great, location is really quiet and reasonable price.

We just finished a 3 day stay here after a week on Fraser Island. This park is fantastic. Very chilled vibes, relaxing, peaceful and quiet. The staff were incredibly friendly and approachable. Amenities block is one of the cleanest you could encounter in a holiday park.
This was exactly the kind of place we wanted to "de-sand" ourselves after the island and would highly recommend the park to anybody thinking of staying in Tin Can Bay to feed the dolphins or for a relaxing break.
Very quiet and relaxing Park. Would recommend
Had a fabulous 4 days so relaxing and peaceful short stroll to shops along the esplanade.Dolphin feeding was awesome to watch

First time at this park, and it will not be the last time we stay here when in Tin Can Bay.|Modern caravan park which means big sites for the vans.|Amenities were also well maintained.|We will definitely stay here again.
Great staff

I stayed 2 nights in a roofed accomodation.

The staff is extremely welcoming, kind and helpful.
My room/house was as clean as clean can be, big and cozy. I felt home!

Most importantly I want to point out the spirit on their campsite. That’s exactly what I love about those sorts of parks (if done correctly).
Everyone’s nice, everyone’s friendly, happy to be there and happy that you are there.

Next visit in the area I’ll certainly stop by again and already know I’ll be welcomed by the hosts (and fellow guests).

Thanks guys!

(Forgot to mention: price was absolutely fair for what you get!)
Hi lovely caravan park .clean and cared for .friends and staff are helpful and we greatly injoyed our 2 nite stay in my motor home near the pool area

A beautiful park indeed, very tidy, well kept, lawns well maintained. Our cabin accommodation was spacious, modern and clean...with plenty of windows and air-conditioning.
The pool area was inviting and the pool was always sparkling clean.
Our host (Maxine) was always happy and welcoming...thankyou.

Definitely worth a visit for sure.
There wasn't any Rif Raf in the park, which is a positive for tourists  and travellers alike.
Oh yes, the Kookaburras do get up early in the morning...absolutely wonderful 👏 😀.

A shuttle bus was available to and from the awesome Country Club (about 10 minutes away).
All in all, a lovely place to hang your hat, to chill and rest.
Jeff.
TCB a nice place.
Lovely and clean outstanding facilities
Great size for caravan, good camp kitchen, very clean, well maintained grounds
Beautiful Park - VERY clean! Salt water pool was kept very clean. Highly recommend this park.
There are all your need in the caravan park, amenities are tidy, kitchen with BBQ. Location was good, close to pub, IGA, and fishing.

Fantastic caravan park, not all squeezed together. Facilities were excellent and clean
Great having rules around kids on scooters and bikes NOT after 6pm, which made it so enjoyable and peaceful. We loved our stay.
Extended stay. September through to March 2026. Great place to stay. Pet friendly.
Great park if you want to be on the edge of town. Good size sites, some shade. Nice garden/ bush setting. Clean amenities. Short walk to waterfront and parks. Office staff was ok.

I had the most wonderful stay at this park. The lady on reception was so welcoming, lovely and super helpful. But the amenitiessss, guys, they are the cleanest toilets, showers, and eating area I have ever come across in a holiday park. The showers have hot water, and no timer or button that you press and you get 1minute of water. Just endless hot water! And so many hooks to hang your clothes, towels, toiletry bags. I was very pleased! Plus a really lovely pool to enjoy and each pitch has plenty of space so you aren't rubbing shoulders with the neighbour's. I highly recommend this park and thanks so much to the team there for a lovely stay! 💖

Wir sind hier für eine Nacht auf dem sehr gepflegten Camping Platz und wurden bereits an der Rezeption sehr freundlich Empfangen. Bei dem schönen Wetter konnten wir die Fahrräder ausleihen und haben Tin Can Bay entdecken können. Am Meer konnten wir sogar Pelikane beobachten. Morgen früh geht's zu den Delphinen. Übrigens besteht auch die Möglichkeit die Fahrräder zu mieten, um die ca. 2,5 km entfernten Delphine zu besuchen. Anschließend konnten wir uns im tollen Pool noch etwas abkühlen. Die Duschen sind auch sehr sauber. Es gibt sogar eine Familiendusche.

Great caravan park. Very helpful and friendly staff. Clean well kept park and amenities.
You can go into town and feed the dolphins for $15. Not sure you can do that anywhere anymore.
Thanks guys

Just wanted to say that on arrival I was greeted by the receptionist who was extremely nice and very helpful, I had a two night stay in my van. The amenities were probably the best I have seen in a caravan park, showers & toilets were spotless, washing machines were available and the outdoor kitchen was fantastic . The grounds were well maintained. Taps and power for your van and grey water outlet are situated close to your van, I highly recommend this park 😊
we love it so much.Beautiful park and such friendly owners and staff.Come and enjoy ,you don't know what you are missing.

We stayed here before heading off to K’gari Island for a week and it was the perfect place to relax before the adventure. When we came back, we needed a proper shower, to clean our gear and wash the car after all the sand. Even though the park was full, the team was incredibly kind and flexible to help us out.

The staff are genuinely lovely and welcoming. The whole place is beautiful, quiet and extremely well maintained. Facilities and amenities are spotless, honestly one of the cleanest and nicest campgrounds we’ve seen in Australia.

Huge thanks to the team for their kindness and generosity. We felt really comfortable and had a great time. If you’re around Tin Can Bay, this place is absolutely worth it.

Absolutely loved our visit. Clean and tidy facilities, the heated pool was a git with the kids and the grounds were very well kept. Staff were suoer helpful and had advise. Highly recommend tin can bay tourist park. If I could give 10 stars they would get it. We are definitely adding this to our list of favourite spots.

Kleiner aber feiner Campingplatz, perfekt um die Fraser Islands zu besuchen (Vom Rainbow Beach aus).
Die Frau an der Reception war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. An einem Abend kam der Thai-Foodtruck mit sehr leckerem Essen.
Wir hatten einen Stellplatz mit eigenem Bad, was wir sehr genossen.
Great place huge sites and modern bathrooms.

Lovely tourist park.
Large pool
Sites are easily accessible.
Dump point onsite
Toilets and showers.
Close to everything.
We would definitely come back.

Great park! Well laid out with spacious sites, this place is a gem!! Great communication before and throughout our stay, helpful friendly staff and first class amenities at good rates. Will certainly be back!!
As a solo traveller I would highly recommend this park! Darren and Sharlene are very accomodating and made me feel very welcome. The amenities are very clean, and the park is spotless.

We spent 2 weeks at the park last year, 2024, have just finished another 3 weeks this year, and already booked for next year! This tells you how good we think this park is. Pleasantly laid out and really helpful staff. Tin Can Bay is a great place to unwind and chill out, and the park matches that perfectly. Good amenities, very clean, immaculate grounds, nice (heated) pool, and even occasional entertainment. Mixed clientele of the usual grey nomads, like us, but also plenty of families with kids.
Had an ensuite powered site and it was great. Staff were super helpful and friendly even texting activity ideas and storm warnings. Will stay there again soon!
Stayed here for 8 days. Very nice park. Well maintained, amenities very clean and well looked after. Will stay here again.

We had a pet friendly cabin which was very well organised and comfortable. Only a few minutes drive to the Dolphins feeding.. .  Very friendly family run business,  the only downside was the internet provided was very poor. Make sure you have plenty of roaming on your phone..
The manager was very polite and helpful.

Thanks again for the Easy Booking as our Kids and Us had Another Fantastic, Peaceful, Fun couple Nights away in the Awesome Cabin we Stayed in 😊 Lovely Reception Lady, Awesome Tourist Park!! Quiet and Beautiful.. We'll Definitely have another Family Trip again in the Future and would love to Stay Here again 😊👌 Thanks for Having Us 😊😊👌

This is an excellent park, from the lovely welcome onwards we loved it. The amenities are spotless, the grounds and camp kitchen are spotless. It has a heated pool that is lovely with plenty of lounges. You need to stay in the C section down the back, most have slabs but the others a fine as well. Would recommend
The park is super clean well set out. What a great caravan park. Best one yet
Awesome. Best park ever. Staff are amazing

What a great place to stay for a nice quiet getaway.
Can not fault the staff,facilities or the location. Nice central place to explore all around the area. The toilets and showers are cleaned every and other areas also. There a number of sites with en suites that can be booked but all sites in the main area are powered and water available. There is a smaller area for off grid camping.
No late night party's, no yahoo's really great place.

This was a pleasant stay. Toilets and showers lovely and obviously kept clean had no complaints about how the campsite was run. However, unfortunately the WiFi access is very (extremely) limited and lasted half an hour for a family of 4. Furthermore, the “shops” and “bars” advertised as a walk away on the website are not a walk whatsoever and there is only one taxi in the bay. Whilst that is normal, shops shouldn’t have been advertised as walking distance when they’re not.

The park is well presented and maintained. The amenities were really clean, including the barbecue/ camp kitchen areas. We stayed on a powered site which was a great size to accommodate our large rig. The esplanade of the quiet township of Tin Can Bay is a short walk away.  We had a relaxing three days on our Queensland road trip.

We were met on arrival and told that our site was ample for our large set up.  And ample it was!  We backed on to the edge of the wetlands, and we had so much room.

Amenities were clean all the time, and the laundry facilities were excellent, despite one washing machine not working.  There WERE two others, so it wasn’t a drama for us.

We were informed of what to do around town, and were also allowed to wash down our van as we had encountered a bit of mud along the road in.

I would love to return to this caravan park again.
Beautiful quite park, close proximity to shops, lovely flat clean walkways following the bay
One of our favourite holiday spots always , great location, clean and well run , did have a noise problem next door that I thought wasn’t  dealt with properly .

We had a fantastic stay at this campsite! Everything was spotless, from the communal areas to the bathrooms. The showers were spacious, clean, and modern, which made all the difference after a long day. You can tell a lot of care goes into maintaining the place. It truly felt like a top-quality camping experience, peaceful and comfortable in every way. Would definitely come back and recommend it to others!

Amenities were very clean and tidy, fantastic parents room -nice and light filled.
Great site backing onto the trees and all the local bird sounds. 3km down to the marina to the dolphin feeding (staff very helpful with info in regard to this). Look looked great although did not swim as it was winter.

Camped in our small bus.Good size spots
Great camp kitchen
This is a reely nice plaice. Caravan park is grate. Oarsome a men a teas and the walk up the river is magic. Not too crowded so it's gud. Wee shall return

I honestly dont think ive been to a holiday park so clean and landscaped immaculately,

The facilities are excellent, the cleanliness is impeccable.

The sites are a really good size, the vegetation is sporadic and healthy.

You get texts, reference the daily visits..food trucks, prawns etc

Thanks so much to the staff for their efforts

It's a great park—clean and well run. The staff was excellent. The amenities block was modern and always clean. The sites are spacious. Food trucks on some evenings made for easy dinners. I will definitely be coming back and staying longer next time. Tin Can Bay is a great town and has a very friendly feel.

Just spent labour day weekend on a Ensuite van site at park,what a great place and awesome staff where nothing was a issue,super clean and well kept gardens and heated pool which was a bonus,Melinda at reception was amazing and very helpful at check in,,,will definitely be back again...
Family, stayed l, well maintained and friendly.  Excellent pool, bbq and amenities  all exceptionally well serviced and clean.
Love it for family holidays, kids busy all the time

We had a lovely stay camping at Tin Can Bay Tourist Park in the April school holidays. This place is well suited to the family who enjoys being in nature and doesn't need a lot of entertainment (e.g. bouncy pillows, gaming rooms etc). The facilities are excellent - the family bathroom made things a lot easier for us, the camp kitchen is well equipped and promoted some lovely socialising between families, and the heated pool was great. There isn't much to do in Tin Can Bay itself but we enjoyed the 4 km pathway along the bay with a few playgrounds and a day trip to Rainbow Beach made for a great stay. There also isn't a lot of food options in town especially if you are vegetarian or have allergies, and there is only an IGA in town (it was a good one though). Overall, highly recommend the park itself.
Had an excellent stay. The cabin was super neat and clean. And the staff were very polite indeed.  Will definitely be returning again.  Kind regards

We stayed for one night and got caught with the floods. The manager was so helpful and happy to go hour by hour after checkout as we figured out what to do   The cabins were basic but very clean and comfortable as we listened to the rains pour down.   Location and setting was nice
Cabin was beautiful and staff were so helpful

The park is very peaceful with lots of shady trees. The caravan sites are big and level. Our host was very friendly and full of information regarding things to do in Tin Can Bay. There is a walking path along the water to the Marina where there are 2 coffee shops and the Dolphin feeding. We will definitely come back here.
Very clean and complete amenities. Lots of room between sites. Accommodating and easy going park!

I liked it here. Great location.
My only complaint is they shut the pool down at night which is great but leave the basketball hoop open. Late at night it's the last thing you want to hear.
This is a tourist park where we took our caravan. Spent 3 nights and it was fantastic. Well maintained and close to the bay and enough shops nearby to pick anything up you may have forgotten.
The amenities are good and clean. We have really enjoyed our stay there. There is a nice park and a drinking water fountain nearby the tourist park.
Great spot. Clean facilities, friendly staff, situated close to waterfront too.

My daughter and her family came for a quick 2 day visit. The tourist park had her into a very comfortable ensuite cabin within 15 minutes of arriving in TCB, she hadn’t had time to book beforehand. Very clean professional set up. The lady on reception couldn’t have been more helpful. Thank you very much

Beautiful place spectacular location, staff super friendly and helpful, amenities clean with well maintained site's and grounds.
Highly recommend.

Thankyou Tin Can Bay Tourist Park for a great stay. 🥰
We enjoyed our dog friendly cabin and the park facilities are great.
It is a credit to all the team, the grounds & facilities are well kept & Jo went the extra mile for us 🙏🏼
Gratitude Judith, Barry & Boo 🐾
Friendly staff and good location. Amenities are quite good.
Best cabin we have stayed in.

Situated just before reaching the town centre, this is a great place to stop and explore the Tin can bay area. Park is a nice walk around size with a mix of permanent and casual visitors. Sites and facilities were very clean and modern.  The pool area is dating a little, but it's still very nice. The only issue is that for families, there is no playground, but there was a basketball court. Our kids still loved the stay, and we would stay again if visiting.

After booking an extra week after staying just one night of a seven night stay, more than $400 for the week, Melanie, the owner,  just called me to say they can't squeeze me in from tomorrow as they have a large group booking coming in tomorrow. Needless to say I am extremely perturbed. I just can't figure out what their real reason is. Is it because I have a brain tumour making me probe to stuttering and involuntary body movements? Is it because  my caravan is completely trashed because I allowed a homeless mother and her two children live in it? Is it the pressure from my extremely charming, but dangerously coercive husband (separated)? Is it because they think I am poor? Is it  because I asked them to pull video footage when my husband blatantly breached an extremely serious domestic violence order? I just don't know....
A nice tidy and clean park with modern facilities.
Very nice clean  park,... a little expensive. Facilities  excellent & not far from town.    Lots of room when we were there,...seems all go to Rainbow Beach where it is very busy!
Great place. Go every year with the fishing club.

The staff are friendly & helpful and the park amenities are modern & super clean. The sites are a good size & well maintained. Enjoyed the entertainment & food truck on Wed arvo/evening. Nice to have a heated pool to swim in. This was our 3rd stay at the park.
Great place to stay

Great park, nice people, but the Thai street food van is terrible. Such a long wait and average food
Suggest you look elsewhere for food

Had a great stay at Tin Can Bay tourist park. Lovely modern and clean facilities which are regularly cleaned. We used the laundry which was reasonably priced and the pool was lovely.
Very friendly and relaxed atmosphere and super quiet at night
Would recommend if you’re in the area.
Good caravan park. Friendly reception staff
Well-maintained par, with new amenities. Reception staff were extremely helpful and pleasant. 200m walk to foreshore. Shops a short drive or a good walk.

The park is well maintained the ensuits are a little bit old but work fine. The sites are spacious  and grassed with  good size slabs.
The staff make the park they are knowledgeable , helpful.
You get a text informing you of weather warnings in the area.
This is must for all to stay

This is one of the nicest caravan parks we have ever stayed in. Everything is clean, large sites and VERY friendly staff who accommodated our request to stay another night with ease. Will recommend the park to everyone. Thank you very much. We will come again.

Probably one of the best holiday parks I've stayed in. You get an ensuite with the powered sites which was a pleasant surprise. Staff were really helpful and nice.
Only small downside was the showers had pretty bad water pressure but that doesn't knock the overall experience.

We booked a powered slab. Although the weather was quite wet we had a fantastic stay! Amenities were clean & well maintained, staff was so friendly & helpful, location was great too. We will definitely come back when the weather is better 👌🏼
Room was very clean and a great size. Bed was extremely comfortable. Will definitely be staying here again 🙂
Very helpful reception staff. Great caravan site and amenities.

They have everything here. Can rent fish, layak, kids equiptment, bike, water, toilet, bbq area, dining area. You name it. Shops, beach, swimming pool,  all are here. Staff very3 helpful and kind. The people around while we're staying are also very friendly and chill.

Great park.|Lovely facilities, good size sites and close to the township.|Impressed and will return.|Thai food van on Wednesday nights was just great.|Easy to get to Rainbow Beach and Maryborough.|Saturday morning markets was very nice.|Facilities very clean and tidy.|Close to town.
Lovely spot, very clean and tidy. Staff are very friendly and helpfull. Loved the pool.

To place some perspective on these comments, we are not caravan people, much preferring life off-grid. Very few caravan parks spark any interest in posting a recommendation. Tin Can Bay Tourist Park is an exception. Great staff, clean and well presented with spotless facilities and sites of an 'acceptable' size and price. If only more parks were like TCP we may become converts 😁. No hesitation in recommending TCP thanks guys for a great stay.

This is the best Park in the Wide Bay. Meticulously maintained, friendly staff, fabulous pool and dog friendly. Pricing is very good particularly if you are a G'day member. The walks are beautiful - waterfront and forests. Our favourite van spot.
Another visit to this Park. Simply the best for all the previous reasons. Still beautifully maintained and more great staff. This time went to the Tin Can Bay Yacht Club on Sunday for lunch, live music and delightful food, cold beer and a great position. The toilet doors at the Club brought a smile.
The owners are seriously beautiful people and they (in my opinion) choose staff who are just like them.
A perfect place to stay. Very nice atmosphere, facilities spotless, near the water, has a pool and the caretaker is lovely and very arranging. Would definitely stay again.

Excellent stay here! We LOVED our site facing the bird watching section. The sites were huge, scenery beautiful (so many different types of birds), amenities were new and very clean, staff very friendly, walk to the foreshore. Highly recommend.
Great sites  clean amenities   friendly staff   great pool heated  camp kitchen clean and tidy  cabins available  clise to town and beach  great walks  close by
Really nice layout despite the long weekend ish. We like being close to amenities and enjoy the quiet surroundings.
Great caravan park close to town and beach

Fantastic park that is clean and quiet. Amenities were lovely, one of the best I've been in. Location is close to the walking/bike path which you can easily take up to any of the kids parks up the way. It was a much needed relaxing place for us to stay along our travels. Tin Can Bay is great for young kids with the parks and dolphin feeding, watching soldier crabs at low tide, and not much traffic so exploring felt a lot more relaxing than Rainbow Beach & Hervey Bay. Caravan spots were spacious and have privacy foliage to some degree between each outer one which was nice. Would come again and reccomend to any friend.
Lovely clean and tidy park. When booking in the information on the town was very friendly and informative.
Tidy park, modern facilities, good roomy a sites down the back

We stayed in a deluxe studio  cabin which was spacious, well appointed and sparkling clean and welcoming. The park is well laid out, tidy, quiet and set among  trees. Tanya at the office is absolutely lovely. She gave us a brief introduction to the town and it's amenities, walks, and points of interest. The only thing that wasn't great was the weather!

Good spot to camp hidden from the Main Street and coast. Very friendly staff and clean amenities, considering it was a quiet weeknight we were given 2 campsites for the price of 1 to give us more room which we really appreciated. Reasonably priced, highly recommend.

Only a 4 star on service as the WiFi doesn't work in the cabin I'm in
Cabins are clean and spacious & location is perfect
A great place for  long or short stays, close to water and play areas for all, including pool, and you can walk along the foreshore with ease.

Really nice park. Very well maintained and super clean amenities.  Lovely people too!
Lots of nice walking paths right next to the inlet.
Recommend going to the Yacht Club and the Marina.
Clean well, managed , friendly,  great area for a holiday.

This place was amazing to stay at for a week, the service was great and the location was pretty. We took a few hikes to see some pretty cool places. I definitely recommend coming here and staying for a few days.
The pool was a bit mercy at times, but it had a ramp and was pretty fun to swim in. You can hire bikes, buy souvenirs and much more. I stayed with my family at one of the powered campsites and had a bathroom. I totally would stay here for some time.

Wow!
A massive thankyou to the ladies in reception!
They were so welcoming and lovely! Out site was large and we had the most amazing time, we stayed 4 nights and wish we didn’t pre book out our next stay as we would of stayed longer.

Camped overnight, very impressed with range of and cleanliness of the facility's.  the tent sites are spaced quite away from each other so it didn't feel overcrowded at all, despite being peak season.  Would definatley like to stay again for longer.
Great park with friendly staff that are customer focused and great facilities that were well maintained. Will be back !
Absolutely 10 outta 10. Rick n cheryl could not be more helpful. everything clean. thanks heaps
Nice place and pool but a bit of a walk from the centre of town
Very clean site, great camp kitchen, problem was, it's to far to walk to the shops.
Great humans, friendly, clean.

Stopped in here, it was packed! Lady in reception was great though, so helpful in getting us a spot sorted to stay for the night. It's not as close to the beach as the other option in town, but it's off the main road and quiet!
Camp kitchen great, bathroom facilities clean and tidy.
We went down to the pub for dinner, about 15-20minute walk, but had great food, also busy! There was the golf club as a dinner option too, which offers a courtesy bus if you need.

Was passing through and needed something last minute.
Staff went out of their way to assist, finding me a place, and ensuring I was settled in when arriving to the property late.
Really stood out as a positive memory from my trip and worth taking the time to post this review.
Awesome camp kitchen  great pool very nice park 👍

Great little caravan Park,  we got a powered site with a ensuite close to.the pool and it's just 1 street away from the water BUT the best part about this park is its DOG FRIENDLY.
The staff are wonderful and very helpful when needed.  We.had a lovely stay thank you 😊

This park was a lovely little surprise. The communal spaces were nice and tidy, with gorgeous gardens and pool area (surprise pool is heated, good size and inviting, including shade and poolside chairs and lounges), nice camp kitchens one with their own little herb garden. ||It had a nice mixture of permeant residents and visitors. It offers plenty of dated but clean and tidy ensuite sites. ||Is located close to the water and the local butcher,bakery and IGA (all very good). ||We really enjoyed our weekend here and will definitely visit again.

Absolutely wonderful place to stay! Immaculate amenities - everything was perfect. Wish we had time to stay longer. Huge thanks to Cheryl, who was super friendly, helpful and knowledgeable. Hope to come back here again in the future.
Great 😃👍

Schöner Campingplatz in Tin Can Bay..
Wenn man will kann man einen Platz mit eigenem Bad, Badezimmer mieten..
Very clean. Best showers ever! Friendly staff.
This caravan tourist park has the best facilities of any park that i can remember.....   fantastic worth a visit.
Great place to stay. Lovely reception staff and fantastic ensuite.
Lovely park - great clean new facilities and particularly appreciated the help planning our K’gari adventure, and the lovely live music on Sunday afternoon

We camped for 12 nights in a motor home awesome people clean amenities helpful with anything office staff helping in booking day trip so much local information lots of walking and bike tracks and close to shops ect  thanks so much we definitely will be coming back 👍😊
Very friendly staff and a great place to set up a base camp for you weekend stay.
Nice place for a camper van .
Great Caravan park. Friendly staff. Very clean amenities.
Spent three lovely days here Reception staff wonderfully helpful Caravan site was a large grassy area Ammenities were absolutely spotless Would highly recommend
It is a fantastic park, the location is great, and the staff are fantastic and friendly. Our room was amazing, clean, great heating and cooling, facilities and pool spotless i would highly recommend.
Clean and tidy, friendly staff and residents

Located just out of the town Tin Can Bay and only a short walk to the water. Very friendly and helpful staff. Amenities block was excellent, one of the nicest we have seen. Nice, comfortable caravan sites. Easy drive to Rainbow Beach and ferry crossing to Fraser Island. Would recommend.
we stayed one night at power site. the facilities are quite clean～ they even have family shower room. highly recommended for the family with kids.
Amenities are really good and modern.  Nice location we had.  But very expensive.

Excellent facilities for a caravan park, a little expensive and busy at times. Seems like a night stopover for some. Staff were super friendly and grounds were very quiet at night. It would be a great gesture to have a communal firepit, so lone travellirs and others could get together. Just a thought to encourage patrons  Walkability to beach are and town centre, excellent

We only stayed one night due to a tight schedule. Phoned late in the afternoon. Staff could not have been more helpful. Even offered to book dinner locally as we would be late in. The cabin was modern and clean. Best comfy bed of the whole trip. Hope to come back and spend more time here. The Groovey Goat bistro at the pub provided an excellent meat also highly recommend.
Sraff were amazing and facilities were great. Very clean and great for families
Well run park, good sized sites, good facilities
Nice park with good room for vans. Very tidy with great amenities. Staff  were very nice.
Powered site. Great spot. Great customer service.
Great little caravan park in a beautiful spot
Stayed two nights, very peaceful clean and tidy.
Great park - clean, good facilities, friendly staff. Nice location with a great walk along the estuary nearby.

I’ve never been to Tim Can Bay before. Such a pity because it’s a beautiful place and Tin Can Bay Tourist Park is a great place to stay if your looking for somewhere to stay during your visit.

It’s close to town or, if your like us & enjoy a good walk, provides an opportunity to walk through the water front park lands on your way to feed the dolphins or to pick some some fish & chips for dinner.
Great Caravan park, we absolutely loved our stay here. Amenities were spotless, staff were super friendly & very helpful. We'll definitely be back!
Really nice place, the cabins themselves are all clean and nicely maintained as well as the ammenities. The staff are super nice, helpful and very accommodating. Had a great stay.
Great tidy park, grassy sites, super clean and new amenity block. Will definitely come back!!
